title: Minky 48pk Sure Grip Pegs
features: SOFT GRIP - Made with a unique firm but gentle grip, they firmly secure your fabrics without leaving any unwanted imprints. These pegs provide the perfect balance of strength and gentleness.
WEATHERPROOF - Designed to resist fading and deterioration from sun exposure, these UV stable pegs are perfect for all your outdoor drying needs, ensuring long-lasting performance.
ANTI-TWIST CONSTRUCTION - These pegs are specially designed to stay intact and prevent splitting during use. Made with premium materials, they offer superior strength and durability.
WIDE JAW - Specifically designed to hold thicker items without losing their grip. With their ergonomic shape and sturdy construction, they provide exceptional support.
BRIGHT COLOURS - Available in blue, purple, green, and pink, these pegs are not only practical but also stylish. With their sleek design and superior functionality, these pegs are a must-have.
description: Product Description Minky Sure Grip Pegs Dry your laundry in style with Minky SureGrip Pegs. Designed for outdoor drying, these pegs are perfect for those who appreciate the freshness of air-dried clothes. 4 Vibrant Colours All Weather Pegs Upgrade your laundry routine with these durable and versatile pegs. Their wide jaw design ensures a secure grip on even the thickest fabrics, making hanging clothes a breeze. Made with UV stable materials, these pegs are built to withstand the harsh sun without deteriorating over time. Grip & Protect Laundry With their firm yet gentle grip, these pegs ensure that your fabrics stay securely in place without leaving any unsightly peg marks. The unique Anti-Twist construction of these pegs guarantees that they won't split apart during use, providing you with long-lasting durability.
